title: scariola alpestris
intro: Scariola alpestris, also known as Alpine Cockscomb or Alpine Marsh Cudweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. Scariola alpestris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it easily accessible for those seeking its medicinal properties.
